testcase.name: TC-BIZ — Hub Landing › TC-BIZ-01: Given I am authenticated, When I navigate to /biz, Then the URL is correct
TC-BIZ — Hub Landing › TC-BIZ-02: Given I am on the page, When I inspect it, Then the "What would you like to do?" heading is shown
TC-BIZ — Hub Landing › TC-BIZ-03: Given I am on the hub, When I inspect the links, Then "Browse Digital" is visible and links to /biz/business/digital
TC-BIZ — Hub Landing › TC-BIZ-04: Given I am on the hub, When I inspect the links, Then "Browse Physical" is visible and links to /biz/business/physical
TC-BIZ — Hub Landing › TC-BIZ-05: Given I am on the hub, When I inspect the links, Then "Seller Dashboard" is visible and links to /biz/business/dashboard
TC-BIZ — Hub Landing › TC-BIZ-06: Given I am on the hub, When I inspect the links, Then "Website Builder" is visible and links to /biz/website-builder
TC-BIZ — Hub Landing › TC-BIZ-07: Given I am on the hub, When I inspect the links, Then "Marketplace" is visible and links to /app/marketplace
TC-BIZ — Browse Digital / Physical › TC-BIZ-08: Given I am on the hub, When I click "Browse Digital", Then I land on /biz/business/digital
TC-BIZ — Browse Digital / Physical › TC-BIZ-09: Given I am on the hub, When I click "Browse Physical", Then I land on /biz/business/physical
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-10: Given I have no store yet, When I open Seller Dashboard, Then I am routed to "Create Seller Profile"
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-11: Given I am on Create Seller Profile, When I inspect it, Then a "Create Profile & Start Selling" button is visible
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › platform\biz.spec.js:85:7 › TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-11: Given I am on Create Seller Profile, When I inspect it, Then a "Create Profile & Start Selling" button is visible
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByRole('button', { name: /create profile.*start selling/i }) Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /create profile.*start selling/i })
84 | 85 | test('TC-BIZ-11: Given I am on Create Seller Profile, When I inspect it, Then a "Create Profile & Start Selling" button is visible', async ({ page }) => { > 86 | await expect(page.getByRole('button', { name: /create profile.*start selling/i })).toBeVisible(); | ^ 87 | }); 88 | 89 | for (const [name, href] of [ at C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-app\web\tests\platform\biz.spec.js:86:88
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-16_16-29-33\artifacts\platform-biz-TC-BIZ-—-Sell-66600-t-Selling-button-is-visible-chromium\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-16_16-29-33\artifacts\platform-biz-TC-BIZ-—-Sell-66600-t-Selling-button-is-visible-chromium\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ..\test-results\2026-06-16_16-29-33\artifacts\platform-biz-TC-BIZ-—-Sell-66600-t-Selling-button-is-visible-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Dashboard: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Dashboard" links to /biz/business/dashboard
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Analytics: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Analytics" links to /biz/business/dashboard/analytics
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Digital-Products: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Digital Products" links to /biz/business/dashboard/digital-products
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Physical-Products: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Physical Products" links to /biz/business/dashboard/physical-products
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Orders: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Orders" links to /biz/business/dashboard/orders
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Cart: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Cart" links to /biz/business/dashboard/cart
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Store-Profile: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Store Profile" links to /biz/business/dashboard/store-profile
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Store-Settings: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Store Settings" links to /biz/business/dashboard/store-settings
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Ads: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Ads & Marketing" links to /app/business/ads
